candidates.why: Direct production/input cost on the income statement; best COGS match.

Inventory asset, not income statement expense.

Headcount metric, not an expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded Financial expenses because it appears to include FX losses and other non-interest items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing total, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line is shown, so Total Equity is used per rule. Consequently MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income subtotal, not balance-sheet non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet minority interest/non-controlling interest line is visible. Since BE uses Total Equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
